summary: Plan-mode classification only. #92479 remains the live canonical issue for the non-security Zen provider catalog regression. #92495 is an explicitly listed security-signal ref in the job and is routed to central security handling instead of being merged, closed, or used for ProjectClownfish mutation.

actions.reason: #92479 is the clearest surviving non-security issue for the Zen provider catalog regression and should remain open as the canonical tracking thread.

The job explicitly marks this exact PR as a security-signal ref, so ProjectClownfish should quarantine it to central OpenClaw security handling and avoid merge, close, label, comment, or fix actions on it.
